summary: The New Zealand vs South Africa 2nd T20I concluded with New Zealand winning by 68 runs to level the series 1-1. The Sheffield Shield match between NSW and Western Australia ended in a draw. No live matches were found for Chandigarh T20 or AFC U20 Asian Cup.
